transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-06]
[00:00] You: Should we add dark mode to the app?
[00:20] Speaker 1: Yeah, we've had a lot of requests. Someone should look into how much work it would be.
[00:45] Speaker 2: I can check — it depends on whether we have CSS variables set up already.
[01:00] Speaker 1: Right. If the design system supports it, it might be pretty quick. Someone should look into the design system first.
[01:25] You: What about the font sizes? Those need fixing too.
[01:40] Speaker 3: Yeah, the font scaling is broken on smaller screens. That's a legitimate bug. I'll fix the font scaling bug by July 10th.
[02:00] Speaker 2: After that's fixed, dark mode might be easier to implement — but no promises yet.
[02:20] You: Let's focus on the font fix first, then revisit dark mode next sprint.

adversarial_injections.description: 'Someone should look into dark mode' — vague, unassigned, no commitment; this is adjacent to Speaker 3's real font scaling commitment
'Someone should look into the design system' — repeated vague suggestion with no owner; not a commitment
'Dark mode might be easier after the font fix — but no promises' explicitly disavows a commitment; not extractable

action_items.description: Fix font scaling bug on smaller screens
action_items.source_quote: I'll fix the font scaling bug by July 10th.

decisions: Focus on font scaling fix first; dark mode revisited next sprint
